extortion.description: Lintec & Linnhoff is a global manufacturer and distributor of leading-edge solutions for the concrete and asphalt industries. Its products include asphalt batching plants, concrete batching plants, pavement related technologies and machinery, and specialist concrete cooling solutions. All its machines are engineered to the highest levels and exceed global standards for environmental impact, recyclability and reusability. Lintec & Linnhoff combine the precision and engineering expertise of its German heritage with the exacting standards required to serve the varied needs of the global construction market. It provides purpose-built solutions to customers that are supported through its team of global experts and distribution partners. Lintec & Linnhoff machinery has helped deliver some of the world's most prominent construction achievements, including: the Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macau bridge; Abu Dhabi's Yas Marina Circuit; The Palm Island, Dubai; and the Storebaelt Bridge Denmark.
